reviews.review_title: One of the worst games I've ever played
reviews.review_description:
You have the typical problems. Team killing kids, screaming kids, just...kids. Everywhere.

But for the actual game. Grabbing almost never works. You're more likely to grab a new magazine while still holding a weapon than you are to let go of the actual weapon. Reloading is almost entirely automated so there's zero skill involved. 

Any map with a tank is just spawning and dying to the tank until you get so mad you leave. There's pretty much no way to kill a tank so they just sit in spawn and camp the entire game until everyone leaves.

All vehicles are piloted by a joystick instead of using actual VR controls. You can't just grab handle bars or a steering wheel and turn with your hands, you have to use a joystick. This is a VR game, why are you avoiding VR interactions?

Barely any weapons. 2 maps. Kids with slurs for their username everywhere.

Just an absolutely awful game.
I love this game so much plz do not get rid of the tank glitch!!!!! Amazing game
Very good shooter love how u can drive cars and etc but I can’t see my knife so please fix that

Look its in early access its a really great game but for FREE and its really good but one thing i would add is a single player or co-op zombie game-mode that would be sick so owner if you could please add zombies i will be very grateful.

Nothing about the way the guns work and the way the game looks itself aren't good. There basically is no mechanics to the guns except for shooting, which the mechanics are insanely simple unlike something detailed like Pavlov or ghosts of tabor. I would at least like to have control of something like the slide to the guns. The vehicles also aren't that good and have weird controls for a vehicle in virtual reality. I know that it is probably in very early development if im not mistaken, but right now, this game isn't the best. This game will hopefully get better in the future and I am looking forward to it if it does happen. It would be nice to have another free, high quality FPS in VR. If the developers do end up putting work into this game then I 100 percent support the growth of this game.
